name: system-coherence-monitor
description: Autonomous AGNT ecosystem health monitor. Detects runaway workflows, error storms, credit anomalies, and system degradation. Self-aware observability layer.
author: jacksonjp0311-gif

schema.title: Check System Health
schema.description: Scans all workflows, executions, and agents for anomalies. Returns health report with coherence score 0-100.

schema.title: Generate Coherence Report
schema.description: Produces a markdown coherence report with anomaly detection, credit analysis, and recommendations.

outputPath.description: Path to write the report file
